etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "un-" + "believe" + "-ing" from Old English "gelefan" (not having faith)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Experiencing skeptical/doubtful and unbelieving calling for development support
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: skeptical → skeptical/doubtful → contemporary unbelieving with developmental development
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: skeptical → skeptical/doubtful → unbelieving → understanding development

contemporary_usage.primary_definition: Definition**: Being unbelieving and experiencing skeptical/doubtful supported by supportive awareness
contemporary_usage.register: Indicates skeptical/doubtful calling for support and development
